Class GameController

java.lang.Object
controller.GameController
public class GameController extends Object
Main controller responsible for all core gameplay logic. Handles dice rolling, land buying, rent payment, trading, bankruptcy processing, turn management, and UI updates.

      public void handleTrade(LandSlot slot, int price, Player target)
      Trade a land from the current player to target at the given price. Matches the class-diagram signature; delegates to the TradeRequest-based implementation below.
